tasks.gate: pytest, ruff, release_check, secret_scan, git diff --check
tasks.summary: Create a repository-local SQLite library containing source metadata, summaries, task links, env metadata, cron schedules, and grading records.
tasks.title: Initialize deterministic source and summary library

tasks.gate: pytest, ruff, release_check, secret_scan, git diff --check
tasks.summary: Compare Mission Control, SwarmClaw, OpenCode Hermes, and Hermes watcher patterns, then map them into LOKI's advisory-only autonomy model.
tasks.title: Document orchestration patterns for HermesP and HermesS

tasks.gate: pytest, ruff, release_check, secret_scan, git diff --check
tasks.summary: Record Python, OS, package/tool presence, Railway variable names, and service URLs without storing secret values.
tasks.title: Capture redacted environment and runtime inventory

tasks.gate: pytest, ruff, release_check, secret_scan, git diff --check
tasks.summary: Build cron-safe watcher scripts with watermark deduplication, capped state, rate-limit handling, and test fixtures for external APIs.
tasks.title: Implement RSS, GitHub, and JSON watcher modules

tasks.gate: pytest, ruff, release_check, secret_scan, git diff --check
tasks.summary: Define allowlist/denylist controls, source confidence scoring, unsafe-content filters, audit receipts, and operator approval before posting.
tasks.title: Add safe crawler/recommendation policy and queue

tasks.gate: pytest, ruff, release_check, secret_scan, git diff --check
tasks.summary: Create HermesS persistence for task dispatch, dependencies, heartbeats, restart/reassign decisions, role rotation, audit logs, and cron schedules.
tasks.title: Build Shepherd Router task queue and heartbeat monitor

tasks.gate: pytest, ruff, release_check, secret_scan, git diff --check
tasks.summary: Finish the remaining P1 surface by displaying deterministic member profiles and Camelot exports while preserving public-memory-only redaction rules.
tasks.title: Add dashboard/operator views for Camelot exports and source-aware profiles

tasks.gate: pytest, ruff, release_check, secret_scan, git diff --check
tasks.summary: Complete the remaining Activity Bridge slice with durable room status, stale cleanup semantics, and Discord command failure tests.
tasks.title: Add Activity Bridge room heartbeat, stale cleanup, and persistence contract

tasks.gate: pytest, ruff, release_check, secret_scan, git diff --check
tasks.summary: Implement non-blocking optional audio capability checks, ffmpeg wrappers, and DCA asset helpers that never block Railway startup when dependencies are absent.
tasks.title: Add optional FFmpeg/DCA capability probes and wrappers

tasks.gate: pytest, ruff, release_check, secret_scan, git diff --check
tasks.summary: Build a dashboard/operator endpoint for redacted status packets, proposal grading, rollback metadata, and advisory-only approval boundaries.
tasks.title: Expose safe Mythos packet compilation and proposal queue

tasks.gate: pytest, ruff, release_check, secret_scan, git diff --check
tasks.summary: Run local gates, validate source coverage, grade each task across code, tests, docs, security, rollback, memory integration, and user value.
tasks.title: Grade every slice and retry below-threshold work safely
